name: FAQ Accordion
description: Click-to-expand FAQ using HTML details/summary elements.
html:
Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before getting started.

How do I get a free estimate? ▼
Simply call us or fill out our online contact form. We'll schedule a convenient time to visit, assess the job, and provide a detailed written estimate at no charge.
Are you licensed and insured? ▼
Yes, we are fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We carry both general liability and workers' compensation insurance to protect you and our team on every job.
What areas do you serve? ▼
We serve the greater metro area including all surrounding suburbs within a 30-mile radius. Contact us to confirm service availability in your specific location.
How quickly can you respond? ▼
For emergency services we aim to be on-site within 2 hours. For standard appointments, we typically have availability within 24–48 hours.
Do you offer a warranty on your work? ▼
All our work is backed by a minimum 90-day workmanship warranty. Many services include extended warranties of up to 1 year. Ask your technician for details.
What payment methods do you accept? ▼
We accept all major credit cards, checks, and bank transfers. Payment is due upon job completion unless otherwise arranged in writing.

name: Two-Column FAQ
description: Two-column layout of Q&A pairs, great for longer FAQ lists.
html:
Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to the questions we hear most often.

How do I schedule a service?

You can book online through our website, call us directly, or send an email. We confirm all appointments within one business hour.

What is your cancellation policy?

We require 24-hour notice for cancellations. Late cancellations may be subject to a small fee to cover our technician's time.

Do you provide free estimates?

Yes! All estimates are completely free with no obligation. We'll visit your property, evaluate the scope, and provide a written quote.

Are your staff background-checked?

Absolutely. Every team member undergoes a thorough background check, drug screening, and reference verification before joining our team.

Do I need to be home during the service?

For most exterior services, your presence isn't required. For interior work, someone 18+ must be home. We'll let you know when booking.

Can I get a recurring service plan?

Yes, we offer monthly and quarterly maintenance plans at a discounted rate. Ask about our service agreement when you call.
